---
title: "NodeLayer.tsx"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/vis/components/NodeLayer.tsx"
loc: 80
complexity: 6
logic_score: 3.27
style_score: 4.00
intel_score: 2.00
overall_score: 3.68
---

## Intent
React component rendering NodeLayer.

## Interaction Protocol
Include <NodeLayer /> within a React-Three-Fiber Canvas context.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 11 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [useRef](file://react)
- [useMemo](file://react)
- [*](file://three)
- [useFrame](file://@react-three/fiber)
- [Node](file://../types/index.ts)
- [Link](file://../types/index.ts)
- [useNodeEffects](file://../logic/useNodeEffects.ts)

### Exports
- `tempObject`
- `tempColor`
- `NodeTier`
- `meshRef`
- `useNodeEffects`
- `currentMesh`
- `calculateEffect`
- `NodeLayer`
- `NodeLayer`
- `useNodeEffects`
- `nodesByDetail`
- `tiers`
- `calculateEffect`
- `tierIdx`
